title: Product Marketing Manager (m/f/d)
bonus_skills: Cross-functional project delivery in matrix organization
core_responsibilities: Lead end-to-end product development across the lifecycle
Define and own product roadmap including feature prioritization
Collaborate closely with Engineering and R&D on development milestones
Engage global customers for VoC insights and roadmap shaping
Manage technical product documentation, Alpha/Beta qualification phases
recommended_emphasis: Strong product marketing fundamentals (GTM strategy, PLM, VoC)
Cross-functional project delivery experience at HSBC and Hapag-Lloyd
Customer-facing pre-sales and account management from GRG and IPC roles
Agile project management skills with JIRA/Confluence
